title: [Griffin's Keen, Valley of Peace]
description: A worn track threads through piles of broken rock and snow-covered scree.  More suited to mountain rolton than the upright races, it winds up and around toward the north face of the mountainside.

wayto.4572: ;e if (UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode == 'wait') or ((UserVars.mapdb_ice_mode != 'run') and ((XMLData.encumbrance_value > 50) or ((Skills.survival < 50) and not Spell['Haste'].active?))); sleep 0.2; echo 'trying not to slip...'; sleep 4; end; move 'down'
